CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-03-2015 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-07-2015 Continued To Sep-23-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-05-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joshua R. Mino, Esq. of Houser & Allison, (949-679-1111), APPEARING THROUGH COURT CALL for HSBC Bank USA, Defendant and moving party.
No other appearances.

Defendant requests and argues that demurrer be sustained without leave to amend. Request is DENIED.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT HSBC BANK USA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE to address all issues raised by demurrer. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare order approved as to form. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501
